description_long: This is a modern, angular house set on a sloped, triangular plot surrounded by tall, slender trees. The structure features a mix of dark gray and brown exterior materials, with flat roofs and a combination of large and small windows distributed asymmetrically across the facade. The house is multi-leveled, adapting to the terrain, and includes a prominent rectangular volume clad in wood, contrasting with the darker main body. The landscaping is minimal, with a grassy yard and a paved pathway leading to the main entrance. The overall design emphasizes clean lines, geometric forms, and integration with the natural environment. The house appears to have multiple entry points and a driveway or walkway leading up to it.
description: A modern, multi-level house with flat roofs, dark gray and brown exterior, and large windows, set on a sloped, tree-lined plot. The design features clean lines, geometric forms, and a mix of materials.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, flat roofs, and a mix of dark and wood-clad volumes, with a paved path and trees in the background.
description_view_1: Side-rear view highlighting the wood-clad section, vertical window arrangement, and the sloped terrain with trees densely behind the house.
description_view_2: Rear view with more trees in the foreground, showing the house's integration with the landscape and the asymmetrical window placement.
description_view_3: Side view dominated by the tree line, with the house partially obscured, emphasizing the dark facade and flat roof profile.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large and small windows
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway with a flat overhang, steps, and a prominent door integrated into the geometric facade
